strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js across multiple senior roles
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus testing workshops and OSS contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
No explicit Vitest experience; testing background skews toward Selenium and custom D-lang tooling
Limited explicit cloud/Kubernetes depth beyond AWS CDK and a self-hosted k8s deploy for GISCollective

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at re:cinq

response.justification: Candidate far exceeds the 6+ years fullstack bar with senior TS/Node roles at Optilyz, RIDE, and re:cinq, and directly matches the AI-agent requirement via current MCP and agentic-workflow work at re:cinq. React (Optilyz), MongoDB, Docker, and Git are all evidenced; Kotlin/Java appears only lightly (robotic arms at Altom) and Nest.js/Vitest are not named, though the underlying Node/TS and testing fluency (TDD advocacy, Selenium course, Fluent-Asserts library) make ramp-up low-risk. Overall the evidence strongly supports the core competencies with minor stack-specific gaps.
